title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 231.450 - Funds may be appropriated for local purposes
text:
231.450.  Funds may be appropriated for local purposes. — The general assembly may appropriate funds to the office of administration to be paid to the various counties and cities to be used solely for road and bridge purposes as provided in sections 231.450 to 231.460.
(L. 1979 S.B. 109 § 1)
